judge.reason: Primary purpose is to register a power domain device node in a static array for later use (special PM domain list). The refcount operations (of_node_put on early returns, reference transfer on success) are incidental to the registration logic (parsing, deduplication, bounds check). Not a get/put/set wrapper with focused refcount semantics.
